description: A coleo definitiva e curada de recursos de Inteligncia Artificial (AI), Machine Learning (ML) e Deep Learning (DL). Inclui frameworks, modelos, datasets, MLOps, LLMs e aplicaes financeiras/comerciais.

A real-time AI-powered smart assistant control system that uses computer vision and hand gesture recognition to interact with a computer without physical touch. The project leverages MediaPipe, OpenCV, Machine Learning, and Flask to recognize gestures and map them to system-level actions for an intelligent and interactive user experience.
AI-driven SQL Server backup monitoring framework for anomaly detection, SLA risk analysis, Predictive Failure Risk and operational telemetry insights using Python and machine learning

This project demonstrates the development of a simple traditional rule-based chatbot using Python and Microsoft Bot Framework. The chatbot responds to predefined user commands using conditional logic instead of Large Language Models (LLMs) or machine learning approaches.
A Hybrid Machine LearningPhysics Framework for Predicting Electronic Properties of Mg-Doped Bulk and Two-Dimensional ZnO in Data-Sparse Regimes

A machine learning framework to predict VLSI circuit delays from RTL metrics. Using 20 designs and ensemble techniques, it achieved 3.28% MAPEfar better than the 10% target. The system integrates multiple models, Bayesian optimization, SHAP explainability, delivers a production API with 12ms latency and 90% confidence intervals.

Im a passionate machine learning practitioner who transforms raw data into smart, realworld applications. Over the past months, Ive developed and deployed multiple endtoend projects covering natural language processing, computer vision, and classical machine learning  all built from scratch or finetuned using modern frameworks.

A curated collection of high-quality learning materials, research papers, datasets, frameworks, and practical guides covering every major area of Artificial Intelligence  including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Generative AI, Reinforcement Learning, and MLOps.

A project leveraging machine learning to classify CRC recommendations into thematic clusters, bottlenecks, and sub-domains of the ECA Child Rights Monitoring Framework. This project enhances efficiency and accuracy in monitoring child rights, supporting UNICEF's work in Europe and Central Asia.
Apache Mahout is an open-source framework for building scalable machine learning applications.
AI-driven Automated Machine Learning Framework for Materials Science
GOAL (General Open Atomistic Laboratory) is a Python framework for training machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) on atomistic systems.
Description: Geospatial analytics and machine learning framework for rural financial access analysis in Scotland.

A Universal Customer Churn Prediction System is an advanced analytics framework designed to identify which customers are likely to stop using a service or product. The "universal" system is built to be industry-agnostic, capable of processing diverse data streamsfrom banking transactions to telecom usageusing a unified machine learning pipeline.
An end-to-end data pipeline and machine learning model built in Python to predict supply chain delays, mapped to a financial risk framework and a dual-perspective Power BI executive dashboard.
Algorithmic Trading in Python with Machine Learning
Visual framework and research exploration of major machine learning algorithms, their classifications, and real-world applications.
Decentralized, event-driven echo propagation orchestrates machine learning-driven, scalable stream processing with adaptive, high-availability infrastructure Framework.

GenAI-Ensemble-Agentic framework for tail-event prediction in tabular regression  combining ensemble machine learning, data augmentation via conditional generative AI, and agentic-AI hyperparameter optimization.
Machine learning framework for cross-sectional stock return prediction using Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, and Ridge Regression.

Framework  for comprehensive variant detection in whole genome sequences using advanced machine learning models for cross domain pattern recognition in fitness, pharmacogenetics and nutritional aspects of sprint running

Comprehensive framework for extracting interpretable decision trees from black-box machine learning models. This project focuses on **post-hoc local/global interpretability** through **rule/tree extraction** methods.
MAILA  a MAchine learning framework for Inferring Latent mental states from digital Activity

Hybrid econometric and machine learning framework for volatility forecasting in the Tehran Stock Exchange under different market regimes. Includes GARCH-based benchmarks, regime-switching models, and ML methods such as Random Forest, XGBoost, and LSTM with macro-financial feature engineering and backtesting evaluation.

A probabilistic machine learning framework for modeling latent regimes in sequential data. Uses Hidden Markov Models to infer hidden states driving financial market behavior and sports performance dynamics, enabling regime detection, transition analysis, and interpretable time-series insights across domains.

Cognitive Engine is a modular AI agent framework for building intelligent, decision-driven systems. It combines rule-based logic, machine learning, and large language models (LLMs) to enable adaptable and extensible agents across multiple domains.

A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.
Machine Learning assignments and experiments including data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, optimization, and explainability techniques using Python and deep learning frameworks.

An Intelligent Multi-Disease Diagnosis Framework using Hybrid Machine Learning and Deep Learning models to predict multiple diseases from medical data. The system combines AI techniques for accurate, fast, and scalable diagnosis support with an easy-to-use healthcare prediction interface.
A Hybrid Feature Selection Framework for Biomarker Identification in Cholangiocarcinoma Using Gene Expression Data and Machine Learning
A data-centric machine learning framework for analyzing feature reliability, stability, drift behavior, and feature importance consistency in ML pipelines.
Standardized machine learning and hyperparameter optimization (GS, RS, BO) framework for low-cost CO sensor calibration. Built on the AQ-MultiCal platform.

PKTron 4.0.1: 150+ Quantum Classes, 13 Simulation Backends (Statevector, MPS, PEPS, Clifford), HPC GPU-Distributed Runtime, Tensor Networks, QAOA, VQE, Shor, Grover, Quantum Machine Learning, QKD Cryptography, Surface Code Error Correction, Quantum Finance, and Full OpenQASM 3 Interoperability in One Unified Framework
Small Patients, Sparse Events: An End-to-End Framework for Machine Learning for Pediatric Sleep Apnea Detection
An integrative machine learning, explainable AI, and molecular simulation framework for the discovery of selective SIRT1 inhibitors against Triple Negative Breast Cancer
ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks
Machine learning framework for insurance claim classification and claim cost prediction.
Prediction of Migration Barrier
Reproducible machine-learning framework for credit default prediction using Home Credit relational borrower histories, LightGBM, risk-decile analysis, and managerial decision-support outputs.
Keep track of the newest machine learning frameworks on GitHub
Physics-informed machine learning framework for predicting and reducing harmonic distortion (THD) in residential power systems using AO-NFRS and Bayesian-optimized ANFIS.

LAB-Score is a safety-gated genomic framework for prioritizing lactic acid bacteria candidates using genome annotation, AMR/safety screening, functional trait panels, CAZyme profiling, machine-learning interpretation, and interactive strain-level radar reports.

This project focuses on developing a machine learning framework for the early and accurate prediction of heart disease. By leveraging medical parameters like age, cholesterol, and ECG results, the project aims to replace traditional, time-consuming diagnostic methods with efficient classification models.
Machine learning-based intrusion detection framework using CICIDS2017 dataset and traditional classification models for reducing false positive rates in network security.
HiveMind, a decentralized training framework designed to coordinate heterogeneous consumer hardware for machine learning tasks over local networks.

A professional-grade machine learning framework designed for (M15) quantitative analysis and automated execution on (XAU). This project demonstrates an end-to-end ML pipeline, from high-fidelity data ingestion to advanced feature engineering and ensemble model training.

A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.
A Python framework for volatility forecasting using Quantum Reservoir Computing (Qiskit) and GARCH (Arch). Benchmarks quantum machine learning against econometric baselines on S&P 500 data.

Explainable AI framework for precision drug response prediction in breast cancer using TCGA BRCA and GDSC datasets. Integrates machine learning, pharmacogenomics, and interpretable AI to predict personalized therapeutic responses and rank candidate drugs computationally.
Machine learning project for predicting arthritis risk levels using CatBoost, XGBoost, and healthcare datasets

The model integrates 252,056 field records from 18,004 sites across China to build a multi-source datadriven machine learning framework for wheat yield prediction. Based on this model, N, P, and K fertilization strategies were optimized for agronomic (AOF), economic (EOF), and environmentalsocial (ESOF) benefits.
An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.
Elevated Edge Machine Learning Fabric: Scalable Real-Time Processing, Adaptive Auto-Scaling, Distributed Intelligence Framework.
Tensor-graph based machine learning framework for metal alloys.

Discover key research papers on Quantum Machine Learning (QML) and explore transfer learning frameworks, applications, and optimization strategies.
Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

A case study integrating parametric modeling and machine learning to explore the design space and develop a surrogate model for prediction. The framework enables parameter importance ranking, and sensitivity analysis, uncertainty analysis, pareto front analysis, etc..

Understanding of deep learning concepts such as Convolutional Neural Networks and Vision Transformer architectures. Knowledge of image preprocessing, feature extraction, and attention mechanisms for detecting manipulated media. Experience working with deepfake datasets and training/testing machine learning models.
Machine-learning framework for external audit fraud-risk assessment with synthetic data, interpretable models, validation diagnostics, and reproducible manuscript figures.
An ensemble machine learning framework (XGBoost, Random Forest, Monte Carlo) to predict F1 results using early-season data.
AI-driven infrastructure risk analytics framework using Machine Learning, SMOTE, Random Forest, and Power BI.

AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.
Multimodal fusion framework for Parkinson's disease detection using Late fusion upon machine learning and deep learning models developed on voice, gait, daTscan, and MRI datasets.
An efficient Python toolkit for Abductive Learning (ABL), a novel paradigm that integrates machine learning and logical reasoning in a unified framework.

An Explainable AI-powered obesity risk prediction framework that combines Machine Learning and Counterfactual Explanations to provide personalized lifestyle recommendations. The project uses Random Forest, XGBoost, SVM, and DiCE-based XAI to predict obesity risk and generate actionable health insights for preventive healthcare.
AI-powered urban sprawl monitoring and 2030 prediction framework using GHSL, Sentinel-2, Google Earth Engine, and Machine Learning for Chennai, Hyderabad, and Bengaluru.
Machine learning framework for Enterococcus cecorum pathogenicity prediction (Antimicrobial Resistance + genomic islands + pangenome)
Real-time Predictive Analytics Platform Empowering Intelligent Data Preprocessing and Scalable Distributed Execution on an Adaptive Machine Learning Framework.

End-to-end machine learning project predicting referendum outcomes using real-world Swiss municipal data.   Evaluated model performance using RMSE within a Kaggle competition framework.   Demonstrates skills in data analysis, model selection, and reproducible ML workflows.
Machine learning equity alpha signal framework with ensemble models, LSTM walk-forward validation, and transaction-cost-aware backtesting.

Marella Reliability Model (MRM)an AI-driven framework designed to improve reliability in multi-cloud financial systems. It focuses on moving from reactive monitoring to predictive observability, enabling organizations to detect issues early, automate incident response, and optimize cloud costs. The approach combines SRE, machine learning, FinOps

This project investigates the impact of feature selection using the Dream Optimization Algorithm (DOA) on the performance of different machine learning classifiers. The study combines optimization theory, statistical learning, and mathematical modeling in a unified experimental framework.

This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods
A comprehensive machine learning framework for quantitative trading strategies
A comprehensive machine learning framework for cryptocurrency price prediction using advanced time series models and financial metrics evaluation.
A comprehensive framework for synthesizing machine learning models and automating service tracing, testing, and operational diagnostics.
Machine Learning based photo attendance framework

A smart retail analytics framework built with Streamlit. Uses K-Means for RFM segmentation and FP-Growth for predictive basket analysis. Eliminates guesswork with transparent metrics (Lift/Confidence) and identifies "Revenue at Risk." Features dynamic thresholding to uncover hidden VIP patterns. Optimized for scalable e-commerce intelligence.
Traffic and incident prediction framework using machine learning and data fusion techniques.
A high-level orchestration and pipeline framework for quantum machine learning
A research framework for collecting, analyzing, and eventually synthesizing execution traces using machine learning.

An angle calculator that is based on google's open source machine learning framework "mediapipe" that takes in a footage of a person walking and calculates different types of angles at each frame throughout the video. This is necessary for physicians to diagnose certain locomative related diseases.
A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.
Machine learning framework for predicting sodium-ion battery electrode properties

An end-to-end machine learning framework designed to detect fraudulent credit card transactions. Implements advanced data preprocessing and handles extreme class imbalance (SMOTE) to identify anomalies and protect financial transactions with high precision and recall.

Explainable Machine Learning framework for Multiple Sclerosis (MS) subtype classification (RRMS, SPMS, PPMS) using clinical and MRI-derived features, integrating SHAP-based interpretability and counterfactual explanations for actionable insights.

A TED-based workflow for proteomics domain search and automated statistics. Accept proteomics data input and returns domain resolution results in a Microsoft Excel XLSX file. The workflow also includes modules for statistical and machine learning clustering and differential analysis of proteomics domain data from different species.

Streamlit Complete Reference Notes Streamlit is an open-source Python framework for building interactive web apps for data science and machine learning  with no front-end experience required. You write pure Python, and Streamlit renders the UI in a browser. Every time a user interacts with a widget, the script reruns from top to bottom.

ARCO (Algorithms for Recognition of Chemical Objects) is a Computer-Assisted Structure Elucidation (CASE) framework that integrates machine learning and rule-based chemical constraints to generate and rank plausible molecular structures from infrared (IR) spectral data and molecular formula information.
Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.

This study aims to develop a reliable machine learning model to predict daily stock market price movement directions. Due to the complex nature of financial markets, a blending ensemble framework is implemented, combining multiple models to improve prediction accuracy, stability, and robustness.
Cognitive-orchestrated SynthLink framework harmonizes real-time analytics with machine learning-driven prediction, empowering scalable enterprise integrator.
It is file which includes research paper named  A Hybrid Rule-Based and Machine Learning Framework for Academic Performance Prediction
A Python framework for machine learning experiments in industrial machinery fault diagnosis through vibration analysis.
A Temporal Machine Learning Framework for Early Detection of Food Insecurity Using Administrative Microdata

scikit-learn_bench benchmarks various implementations of machine learning algorithms across data analytics frameworks. It currently support the scikit-learn, DAAL4PY, cuML, and XGBoost frameworks for commonly used machine learning algorithms.
